judgment.summary: Profitable e-commerce platform with solid growth and margins, but carries significant debt and a high valuation relative to earnings growth.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 5.0%; next earnings date is 2026-07-29.
positives: Revenue growth 19.5% YoY — strong top-line expansion.
Operating margin 23.1% and Profit margin 17.6% — healthy profitability.
Return on equity 42.9% — efficient use of shareholder capital.
Forward P/E 17.47x — attractive relative to trailing P/E and analyst growth estimates.
negatives: Debt/Equity 163.33 — high leverage on the balance sheet.
PEG ratio 1.86 — valuation appears stretched relative to earnings growth.
Mean analyst target $108.13 — below current price, suggesting limited upside.
Beta 1.39 — stock exhibits higher volatility than the broader market.

news.paragraph: The recent passing of Ittai Gradel, known for uncovering significant thefts at the British Museum, is noted but is unrelated to eBay's operational performance or upcoming catalysts. Investors should focus on the company's upcoming earnings report and its fundamental metrics rather than this tangential news item. The next earnings date is July 29th.

headlines.title: Ittai Gradel, Who Discovered Massive Thefts at the British Museum, Dies at 61
